verdict.note: M4 L3 foundation, LIVE + RETAINED for demos on the real non-prod dev account, REGION-UNIFIED to us-east-1 (earlier us-west-2 deploy — caused by a stray AWS_REGION env — was torn down; Cognito domain prefix root-fixed to an account+region-unique value to avoid the global collision). Three free-tier stacks retained: Guardrail (re-verified GUARDRAIL_INTERVENED masking a fake AWS key + sk- token), Cognito identity (us-east-1 OIDC discovery reachable, RS256, authorizer contract verified), CloudWatch dashboard + TokensPerScenario + monthly Budgets alarm. VPC PrivateLink endpoints (the only standing ~$30/mo cost) stay cost-gated OFF. All CDK stacks use the NATIVE AWS::BedrockAgentCore::{Gateway,Registry,Memory,Harness} CFN types — genuinely AgentCore-based, not generic-resource stand-ins. IDs/account scrubbed.
